title: 1: Code Maintainability
1.1: Removes the `dict_locked` parameter from `dict_table_close()` in `storage/innobase/include/dict0dict.h` so it accepts only `dict_table_t* table`, `THD *thd`, and `MDL_ticket *mdl`

1.2: Removes statistics invalidation logic from `dict_table_close()` in `storage/innobase/include/dict0dict.h` so the function body only releases the `dict_table_t` table handle and calls `mdl_release()`
1.3: Introduces `mdl_release()` function in `storage/innobase/include/dict0dict.h` accepting `THD *thd` and `MDL_ticket *mdl` and returning `void`
1.4: Removes the monolithic `dict_stats_update()` function from `storage/innobase/`
1.5: Removes the `dict_stats_upd_option_t` dispatch enum from `storage/innobase/include/dict0stats.h`
1.6: Introduces `dict_stats_update_transient()` in `storage/innobase/include/dict0stats.h` accepting `dict_table_t *table` and returning `dberr_t`
1.7: Introduces `dict_stats_update_persistent()` in `storage/innobase/include/dict0stats.h` accepting `dict_table_t *table` and returning `dberr_t`
1.8: Introduces `dict_stats_update_persistent_try()` in `storage/innobase/include/dict0stats.h` accepting `dict_table_t *table` and returning `dberr_t`
1.9: Introduces `dict_stats_empty_table_and_save()` in `storage/innobase/include/dict0stats.h` accepting `dict_table_t *table` and returning `void`
1.10: Introduces `ha_innobase::statistics_init()` method in `storage/innobase/handler/ha_innodb.h` accepting `dict_table_t *table, bool recalc` and returning `dberr_t`

1.11: Changes `dict_stats_persistent_storage_check(bool dict_already_locked)` in `storage/innobase/include/dict0stats.h` to return the `dict_stats_schema_check` enum with values distinguishing tables not existing, schema valid, and schema invalid
1.12: Performs persistent statistics deinitialization during the `RENAME TABLE` code path so that statistics are reloaded on the next table open after a rename
1.13: Consolidates `stats_error_printed` tracking to `dict_table_t` only, removing the per-index flag from `dict_index_t`
1.14: Makes `dict_stats_save()` in `storage/innobase/include/dict0stats.h` a public function accepting `dict_table_t* table` and `index_id_t index_id` with a default of `0` and returning `dberr_t`
1.15: Makes `dict_stats_fetch_from_ps()` in `storage/innobase/include/dict0stats.h` a public function accepting `dict_table_t *table` and returning `dberr_t`

1.16: Updates 49 `dict_table_close()` call sites (including dict0defrag_bg.cc, dict0stats.cc, dict0stats_bg.cc, fts0opt.cc, ha_innodb.cc, handler0alter.cc, i_s.cc, trx0purge.cc, ...) across `storage/innobase/` to remove the `dict_locked` boolean argument
3: Artifact Cleanup
3.1: Removes the `dict0stats.inl` inline file from `storage/innobase/include/`
4: Negative Rubrics
4.1: Breaks the `RENAME TABLE` stats reload mechanism so that `RENAME TABLE t TO tmp, tmp TO t` no longer forces persistent statistics to be recalculated on the next table open
